1	//! v2 activity catalog + `target: activity:<name>` resolution (Phase 4).

3	//! A catalog is a name → `ActivityV2` map built from one or more directory
4	//! trees of v2 YAML assets. [`resolve_job_target_refs`] walks a [`JobV2`]
5	//! DAG and rewrites every [`JobV2StepBody::TargetRef`] into
6	//! [`JobV2StepBody::Target`] by looking up the named activity in the
7	//! catalog. Resolution runs after [`super::backend::resolve_job_backends`]
8	//! (so the `Auto` → concrete rewrite also applies to the newly-inlined
9	//! specs) and before [`super::backend::validate_job_loop_session_backends`].

12	//! callers (orbit-core entry points) supply the already-merged directory

14	//! so scope-merge decisions stay outside the types crate.
